question: Who is the provider that manages the VTI fund?
cypher: MATCH (p:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'}) RETURN p.name AS providerName

question: Which company, firm, or provider administers the BND fund?
cypher: MATCH (p:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund {ticker: 'BND'}) RETURN p.name AS providerName

question: Who manages the fund with the highest turnover?
cypher: MATCH (p:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.turnover IS NOT NULL RETURN p.name AS providerName, f.ticker, f.name, fh.turnover ORDER BY fh.turnover DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who manages the trust for the fund with turnover rate 4%?
cypher: MATCH (p:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund) -[rel:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.turnover = 4 RETURN p.name AS providerName ORDER BY rel.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the net assets value for VTI?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN f.ticker, f.name, fh.netAssetsValueEnd ORDER BY r.year DESC

question: Show funds with expense ratio over 0.5%
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.expenseRatio > 0.5 RETURN f.ticker, f.name, fh.expenseRatio, r.year ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: Does VTI have turnover higher than 10%?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN f.ticker, fh.turnover > 10 AS isHighTurnover, r.year ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which funds have more than 5000 holdings?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(p:Portfolio) WHERE p.count > 5000 RETURN DISTINCT f.ticker, f.name, p.count AS numberHoldings

question: How many holdings does each fund have in the database?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(p:Portfolio) WHERE p.count > 100 RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, p.count AS holdingCount ORDER BY holdingCount DESC

question: How many holdings does the fund VTI have in total?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(p:Portfolio) RETURN p.count AS holdingsCount, f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName

question: Which funds are issued by Vanguard Index Funds?
cypher: MATCH (t:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund) WHERE t.name CONTAINS 'Vanguard Index Funds' RETURN f.ticker, f.name

question: Find funds managed by Vangurd
cypher: CALL db.index.fulltext.queryNodes('providerNameIndex', 'Vangurd~') YIELD node, score MATCH (node)-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund) RETURN f.ticker, f.name, score ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 5

question: What is the expense ratio of the Total Stock Market fund?
cypher: CALL db.index.fulltext.queryNodes('fundNameIndex', 'Total Stock Market~') YIELD node, score MATCH (node)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN node.ticker, node.name, fh.expenseRatio, score ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which funds does Michael Duglas manage?
cypher: CALL db.index.fulltext.queryNodes('personNameIndex', 'Michael Duglas~') YIELD node, score MATCH (f:Fund)-[:MANAGED_BY]->(node) RETURN f.ticker, f.name, score ORDER BY score DESC

question: What are the tickers of the funds with the provider Vanguard?
cypher: CALL db.index.fulltext.queryNodes('providerNameIndex', 'Vanguard~') YIELD node MATCH (node)-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund) RETURN f.ticker

question: Who are the managers of the VTI fund?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:MANAGED_BY]->(p:Person) RETURN p.name AS managerName

question: Which people or actual human beings manage the Vanguard Growth fund?
cypher: CALL db.index.fulltext.queryNodes('fundNameIndex', 'Vanguard Growth') YIELD node AS f, score WITH f ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 1 MATCH (f)-[:MANAGED_BY]->(p:Person) RETURN p.name AS managerName

question: Does VTI have any image attached to it?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_CHART]->(img:Image) RETURN img.title AS chartTitle, img.category AS category, img.svg AS svg

question: What is the security exchange of VTI?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'}) RETURN f.securityExchange AS exchange

question: What is the objective of the healthcare fund?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund) WHERE toLower(f.name) CONTAINS 'health' MATCH (f)-[:DEFINED_BY]->(:Profile)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(o:Section:Objective) RETURN o.text AS objective

question: Show me all general information about VTI including financial highlights, profile details, and images
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'}) MATCH (prov:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(t:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_SHARE_CLASS]->(sc:ShareClass) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[arRel:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:DEFINED_BY]->(prof:Profile)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(o:Section:Objective) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(port:Portfolio) RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName, prov.name AS provider, t.name AS trust, sc.name AS shareClassName, sc.description AS shareClassDescription, fh.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio, fh.totalReturn AS totalReturn, fh.netAssets AS netAssets, fh.turnover AS turnover, r.year AS year, ar.return1y AS return1y, ar.return5y AS return5y, ar.return10y AS return10y, ar.returnInception AS returnInception, o.text AS objective, port.count AS numberHoldings ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show me all the funds that have more than 15% invested in Technology and return the funds with distinct in the property name
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[h:HAS_SECTOR_ALLOCATION]->(:Sector {name: 'Technology'}) WHERE h.weight > 15.0 RETURN DISTINCT f.name AS fundName

question: Show me the ordered list of funds in decreasing order of the 10 year returns
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(p:AverageReturns) WHERE p.return10y IS NOT NULL RETURN f.name AS fundName, p.return10y AS tenYearReturn ORDER BY tenYearReturn DESC

question: What percentage of VTI's holdings are US-based companies?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) WITH count(h) AS total, count(CASE WHEN h.country = 'US' THEN 1 END) AS usCount RETURN (usCount * 100.0 / total) AS percentageUS

question: Show me all the funds that are Admiral Shares share class?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_SHARE_CLASS]->(:ShareClass {name: 'Admiral Shares'}) RETURN f.name AS fundName

question: What are the risks described for the VTI fund?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:DEFINED_BY]->(:Profile)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(r:Section:RiskFactor) RETURN r.title AS riskTitle, r.text AS riskDescription

question: What are the investment strategies for the Short-Term Bond fund?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:DEFINED_BY]->(:Profile)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(s:Section:Strategy) WHERE f.name CONTAINS 'Short-Term Bond' RETURN s.text AS strategy

question: Show me all the funds that have more than 15% invested in the United States?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[h:HAS_REGION_ALLOCATION]->(:Region {name: 'United States'}) WHERE h.weight > 15.0 RETURN f.name AS fundName

question: Which holding has the highest weight across all portfolios?
cypher: MATCH (:Fund)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) RETURN h.name AS holdingName, h.ticker AS ticker, max(r.weight) AS maxWeight ORDER BY maxWeight DESC LIMIT 1

question: List all funds that share at least one manager with VTI.
cypher: MATCH (f1:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:MANAGED_BY]->(p:Person)<-[:MANAGED_BY]-(f2:Fund) WHERE f1 <> f2 RETURN DISTINCT f2.ticker AS ticker, f2.name AS name, p.name AS sharedManager

question: Show me the fund that had the best total return in the year 2022.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.totalReturn IS NOT NULL AND r.year = 2022 RETURN f.name AS fundName, r.year AS year, fh.totalReturn AS totalReturn ORDER BY totalReturn DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show me the 1y, 5y and inception returns for VTI.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(p:AverageReturns) RETURN p.return1y AS oneYear, p.return5y AS fiveYear, p.returnInception AS inception

question: Show me what is the 1y, 5y and inception return of the VTI fund?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) RETURN ar.return1y AS oneYear, ar.return5y AS fiveYear, ar.returnInception AS inception

question: Show me the ordered list of funds in decreasing order of the 5 year returns
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) WHERE ar.return5y IS NOT NULL RETURN f.name AS fundName, f.ticker AS ticker, ar.return5y AS fiveYearReturn ORDER BY ar.return5y DESC

question: What is the 10 year return for BND?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'BND'})-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) RETURN ar.return10y AS tenYearReturn

question: Which fund has the highest inception return?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) WHERE ar.returnInception IS NOT NULL RETURN f.name AS fundName, f.ticker AS ticker, ar.returnInception AS inceptionReturn ORDER BY ar.returnInception DESC LIMIT 1

question: Compare the 1y, 5y and 10y average returns of VTI and VOO.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) WHERE f.ticker IN ['VTI', 'VOO'] RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS name, ar.return1y AS oneYear, ar.return5y AS fiveYear, ar.return10y AS tenYear

question: What are the average returns for VOO?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) RETURN ar.return1y AS oneYear, ar.return5y AS fiveYear, ar.return10y AS tenYear, ar.returnInception AS inception

question: Show me the funds ranked by their 1-year return in descending order.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) WHERE ar.return1y IS NOT NULL RETURN f.name AS fundName, f.ticker AS ticker, ar.return1y AS oneYearReturn ORDER BY ar.return1y DESC

question: Find the provider managing funds with the lowest average turnover rate.
cypher: MATCH (p:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund)-[rel:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WITH p, avg(fh.turnover) AS avgTurnover RETURN p.name AS provider, avgTurnover ORDER BY avgTurnover ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the investment objective text for VOO?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[:DEFINED_BY]->(:Profile)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(o:Section:Objective) RETURN o.text AS objective

question: Get the performance commentary for VTI.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:DEFINED_BY]->(:Profile)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(pc:Section:PerformanceCommentary) RETURN pc.text AS performance

question: What are the top 5 holdings for VGT?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VGT'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) RETURN h.name AS holdingName, r.weight AS weight ORDER BY r.weight DESC LIMIT 5

question: Show me all the funds that have more than 15% invested in Technology
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[h:HAS_SECTOR_ALLOCATION]->(:Sector {name: 'Technology'}) WHERE h.weight > 15.0 RETURN f.name AS fundName

question: What is the current NAV of the VTI fund?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN fh.netAssetsValueEnd AS currentNAV, r.year AS year ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the net asset value of the VOO fund?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN fh.netAssetsValueEnd AS netAssetValue, r.year AS year ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the ticker symbol for the fund named '500 Index Fund'.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund) WHERE f.name CONTAINS '500 Index Fund' RETURN f.ticker AS ticker

question: What is the fund that has the highest turnover rate?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN f.name AS fundName, fh.turnover AS turnoverRate ORDER BY turnoverRate DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the risk factors from the 10-K filing for Apple?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AAPL'})-[:REPORTS_IN]->(:Filing10K)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(rf:Section:RiskFactor) RETURN rf.text AS riskFactor LIMIT 10

question: What are the funds that have more than 10% invested in the United States?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_REGION_ALLOCATION]->(:Region {name: 'United States'}) WHERE r.weight > 10.0 RETURN DISTINCT f.name AS fundName, f.ticker AS fundTicker

question: Show me the business description from the 10-K for Google.
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'GOOGL'})-[:REPORTS_IN]->(:Filing10K)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(bi:Section:BusinessInformation) RETURN bi.text AS businessInfo LIMIT 5

question: What are the insider transactions for Microsoft?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'MSFT'})-[:HAS_INSIDER_TRANSACTION]->(it:InsiderTransaction)-[:MADE_BY]->(p:Person) RETURN p.name AS insiderName, it.transactionDate AS date, it.transactionType AS type, it.shares AS shares, it.price AS price, it.value AS value, it.position AS position ORDER BY it.transactionDate DESC

question: Show me the financial metrics from the 10-K filing for Tesla.
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'TSLA'})-[rel:REPORTS_IN]->(:Filing10K)-[:HAS_FINANCIALS]->(fin:Section:Financials)-[:HAS_METRIC]->(m:FinancialMetric) RETURN m.label AS metric, m.value AS value ORDER BY rel.year DESC

question: Return both the expense ratio and the turnover rate for VTI.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN fh.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio, fh.turnover AS turnoverRate, r.year ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the net assets for the fund IMTB?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'IMTB'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN fh.netAssets AS netAssets, r.year ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: Return the net assets and total number of holdings for the Vanguard Dividend Appreciation fund.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE f.name CONTAINS 'Dividend Appreciation' OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(p:Portfolio) RETURN f.name AS name, fh.netAssets AS netAssets, p.count AS totalHoldings, r.year ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show me the revenue segments from the 10-K of Amazon.
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AMZN'})-[:REPORTS_IN]->(:Filing10K)-[:HAS_FINANCIALS]->(fin:Section:Financials)-[:HAS_METRIC]->(m:FinancialMetric)-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(s:Segment) RETURN m.label AS metric, s.label AS segment, s.value AS value, s.percentage AS percentage

question: Which companies have a CEO who is also a fund manager?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company)-[:HAS_CEO]->(p:Person)<-[:MANAGED_BY]-(f:Fund) RETURN c.name AS companyName, p.name AS personName, f.name AS fundName

question: What is the CEO compensation for Apple?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AAPL'})-[r:HAS_CEO]->(p:Person) RETURN p.name AS ceoName, r.ceoCompensation AS compensation, r.ceoActuallyPaid AS actuallyPaid, r.date AS date

question: Which documents were used as sources for the VTI fund data?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:EXTRACTED_FROM]->(d:Document) RETURN d.accession_number AS accession, d.url AS url, d.form AS documentType, d.filing_date AS filingDate ORDER BY d.filing_date DESC

question: What sectors does the VGT fund invest in and what are their weights?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VGT'})-[r:HAS_SECTOR_ALLOCATION]->(s:Sector) RETURN s.name AS sector, r.weight AS weight ORDER BY r.weight DESC

question: Show me all of the different sectors that exist in the database
cypher: MATCH (s:Sector) RETURN DISTINCT s.name AS sectorName

question: What is the region distribution of the Mega Cap Index fund.

question: Which funds hold shares of both Apple and Microsoft?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(h1:Holding {ticker: 'AAPL'}), (f)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(h2:Holding {ticker: 'MSFT'}) RETURN DISTINCT f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName

question: What is the total market value of all holdings in the VTI portfolio?

question: What is the fund that holds the most shares of AAPL?

question: Show me all the funds that hold shares of Nvidia (NVDA), Meta (META), and Amazon (AMZN) in their portfolios.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(:Holding)-[:REPRESENTS]->(:Company {ticker: 'NVDA'}) MATCH (f)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(:Holding)-[:REPRESENTS]->(:Company {ticker: 'META'}) MATCH (f)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(:Holding)-[:REPRESENTS]->(:Company {ticker: 'AMZN'}) RETURN DISTINCT f.name AS FundName, f.ticker AS FundTicker ORDER BY FundName ASC

question: Compare the expense ratios of all ETF share class funds.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_SHARE_CLASS]->(:ShareClass {name: 'ETF'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName, fh.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio ORDER BY fh.expenseRatio ASC

question: What is the fund with the most average return since inception?

question: What legal proceedings is Microsoft currently involved in?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'MSFT'})-[r:REPORTS_IN]->(f:Filing10K)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(s:Section:LegalProceeding) RETURN s.title AS sectionTitle, s.text AS legalText, r.year AS year ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: Does Google have any pending lawsuits disclosed in its 10-K?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'GOOGL'})-[r:REPORTS_IN]->(f:Filing10K)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(s:Section:LegalProceeding) RETURN s.title AS sectionTitle, s.text AS legalProceedings, r.year AS year ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: What legal matters has Tesla disclosed in its latest annual report?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'TSLA'})-[r:REPORTS_IN]->(f:Filing10K)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(s:Section:LegalProceeding) RETURN s.title AS sectionTitle, s.text AS legalText, r.year AS year ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show me the legal proceedings from Amazon's most recent 10-K filing.
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AMZN'})-[r:REPORTS_IN]->(f:Filing10K)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(s:Section:LegalProceeding) RETURN s.title AS sectionTitle, s.text AS legalProceedings, r.year AS year ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average expense ratio across all funds managed by Vanguard?
cypher: MATCH (p:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund) WHERE p.name CONTAINS 'Vanguard' OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN avg(fh.expenseRatio) AS avgExpenseRatio

question: Which fund has the best 1-year return among Bond funds?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) WHERE f.name CONTAINS 'Bond' AND ar.return1y IS NOT NULL RETURN f.name AS fundName, ar.return1y AS oneYearReturn ORDER BY ar.return1y DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many different trusts does Vanguard manage?
cypher: MATCH (p:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(t:Trust) WHERE p.name CONTAINS 'Vanguard' RETURN count(t) AS trustCount

question: What is the management discussion from the 10-K filing for Amazon?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AMZN'})-[:REPORTS_IN]->(filing:Filing10K)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(md:Section:ManagemetDiscussion) RETURN md.text AS managementDiscussion LIMIT 5

question: Show me the legal proceedings from the 10-K for Microsoft.
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'MSFT'})-[:REPORTS_IN]->(filing:Filing10K)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(lp:Section:LegalProceeding) RETURN lp.text AS legalProceeding LIMIT 5

question: Show me the evolution of the turnover ratio for VIEIX along the years.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VIEIX'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN fh.turnover AS turnover, r.year AS year ORDER BY r.year DESC

question: Which fund is managed by the highest number of people?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:MANAGED_BY]->(p:Person) RETURN f.name AS fundName, count(DISTINCT p) AS managerCount ORDER BY managerCount DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find all funds that have a higher 1-year return than VOO.
cypher: MATCH (voo:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(vooReturns:AverageReturns) WITH vooReturns MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(fReturns:AverageReturns) WHERE f.ticker <> 'VOO' AND fReturns.return1y > vooReturns.return1y RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName, fReturns.return1y AS fundReturn, vooReturns.return1y AS vooReturn ORDER BY fundReturn DESC

question: Which company had the most insider transactions?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company)-[:HAS_INSIDER_TRANSACTION]->(it:InsiderTransaction) RETURN c.ticker AS ticker, c.name AS companyName, count(it) AS transactionCount ORDER BY transactionCount DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the years where VTI had a negative total return.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.totalReturn < 0 RETURN r.year AS year, fh.totalReturn AS totalReturn ORDER BY year DESC

question: Search Microsoft's 10-K filings for information regarding their cloud computing growth, Azure performance, and server products.
cypher: CALL db.index.vector.queryNodes('chunk_vector_index', 5, $queryVector) YIELD node AS chunk, score MATCH (chunk)<-[:HAS_CHUNK]-(s:Section)<-[:HAS_SECTION]-(f:Filing10k)<-[:REPORTS_IN]-(c:Company) WHERE c.ticker = 'MSFT' RETURN chunk.text AS text, s.title AS sectionTitle, f.year AS filingYear, score ORDER BY score DESC

question: What are the advisory fees for VTI?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN fh.advisoryFees AS advisoryFees ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the investment objective text for VTI?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:DEFINED_BY]->(:Profile)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(o:Section:Objective) RETURN o.text AS objective

question: What are the risk descriptions for VOO?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[:DEFINED_BY]->(:Profile)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(r:Section:RiskFactor) RETURN r.title AS riskTitle, r.text AS riskDescription

question: Show me the investment strategies for the Short-Term Bond fund.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:DEFINED_BY]->(:Profile)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(s:Section:Strategy) WHERE f.name CONTAINS 'Short-Term Bond' RETURN s.text AS strategy

question: Which funds have no performance commentary attached?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund) WHERE NOT EXISTS { (f)-[:DEFINED_BY]->(:Profile)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(:Section:PerformanceCommentary) } RETURN f.ticker, f.name

question: Compare the expense ratio and turnover rate of VTI and VOO.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE f.ticker IN ['VTI', 'VOO'] RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS name, fh.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio, fh.turnover AS turnoverRate, r.year ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show me the main details for both VOO and VGT funds.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE f.ticker IN ['VOO', 'VGT'] OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(p:Portfolio) RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS name, fh.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio, fh.netAssets AS netAssets, p.count AS numberHoldings, r.year ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the payoff profile of the top holding in VTI?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) RETURN h.name AS holdingName, h.ticker AS ticker, r.payoffProfile AS payoffProfile ORDER BY r.weight DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which holdings in VOO have a market value above 5 billion?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) WHERE r.marketValue > 5000000000 RETURN h.name AS holdingName, r.marketValue AS marketValue ORDER BY r.marketValue DESC

question: What are the shares and market value of the top 3 holdings in VGT?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VGT'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) RETURN h.name AS holdingName, r.shares AS shares, r.marketValue AS marketValue ORDER BY r.weight DESC LIMIT 3

question: Show me legal proceedings from the 10-K for Apple.
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AAPL'})-[:REPORTS_IN]->(filing:Filing10K)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(lp:Section:LegalProceeding) RETURN lp.text AS legalProceedings LIMIT 5

question: What was the fund with the highest total return in any single year?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.totalReturn IS NOT NULL RETURN f.name AS fundName, r.year AS year, fh.totalReturn AS totalReturn ORDER BY fh.totalReturn DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show me general information about the VIG fund.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VIG'}) MATCH (prov:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(t:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_SHARE_CLASS]->(sc:ShareClass) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[arRel:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:DEFINED_BY]->(prof:Profile)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(o:Section:Objective) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(port:Portfolio) RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName, prov.name AS provider, t.name AS trust, sc.name AS shareClassName, sc.description AS shareClassDescription, fh.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio, fh.totalReturn AS totalReturn, fh.netAssets AS netAssets, fh.turnover AS turnover, r.year AS year, ar.return1y AS return1y, ar.return5y AS return5y, ar.return10y AS return10y, ar.returnInception AS returnInception, o.text AS objective, port.count AS numberHoldings ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: Give me the main details for the VOO fund.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'}) MATCH (prov:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(t:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_SHARE_CLASS]->(sc:ShareClass) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:DEFINED_BY]->(prof:Profile)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(o:Section:Objective) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(port:Portfolio) RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName, port.count AS numberHoldings, prov.name AS provider, t.name AS trust, o.text AS objective, sc.name AS shareClassName, sc.description AS shareClassDescription, fh.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio, fh.totalReturn AS totalReturn, fh.netAssets AS netAssets, r.year AS year, ar.return1y AS return1y, ar.return5y AS return5y, ar.return10y AS return10y ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which funds share the same source document?
cypher: MATCH (f1:Fund)-[:EXTRACTED_FROM]->(d:Document)<-[:EXTRACTED_FROM]-(f2:Fund) WHERE f1.ticker < f2.ticker RETURN f1.name AS fund1, f2.name AS fund2, d.accession_number AS sharedDocument

question: Show me the properties that Apple holds.
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AAPL'})-[:REPORTS_IN]->(f:Filing10K)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(p:Section:Properties) RETURN p.text AS properties

question: Show me holdings with market value greater than 10000.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) WHERE r.marketValue > 10000 RETURN h.name, r.marketValue

question: Which funds have net assets greater than 1 million?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.netAssets > 1000000 RETURN f.ticker, fh.netAssets, r.year ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show me the top 5 holdings in VTI with their weight, market value, shares, and payoff profile.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) RETURN h.name, r.payoffProfile, r.weight, r.marketValue, r.shares ORDER BY r.weight DESC LIMIT 5

question: Count the total number of holdings in VTI's portfolio.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) RETURN count(h) AS totalHoldings

question: Which providers manage trusts that issue funds?
cypher: MATCH (p:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund) RETURN p.name AS providerName

question: Show me the expense ratio, turnover, net assets, and number of holdings for VTI.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(p:Portfolio) RETURN fh.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio, fh.turnover AS turnoverRate, fh.netAssets AS netAssets, p.count AS numberHoldings, r.year ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: How has the expense ratio for BND shifted across the available financial highlight years?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'BND'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN r.year AS year, fh.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio ORDER BY r.year

question: Give me the cost and fee data for both the VOO and VIG funds.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE f.ticker IN ['VOO', 'VIG'] RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS name, fh.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio, fh.turnover AS turnoverRate, r.year ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the current total assets figure for the BND fund?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'BND'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN fh.netAssets AS netAssets, r.year ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: Give me the assets under management and number of holdings for the Total Bond Market fund.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE f.name CONTAINS 'Total Bond Market' OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(p:Portfolio) RETURN f.name AS name, fh.netAssets AS netAssets, p.count AS totalHoldings, r.year ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: What does the prospectus text say for the VOO fund?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[:DEFINED_BY]->(p:Profile) RETURN p.summaryProspectus AS summaryProspectus

question: Show me the full prospectus description for the Vanguard Total Stock Market fund.
cypher: CALL db.index.fulltext.queryNodes('fundNameIndex', 'Total Stock Market~') YIELD node, score WITH node ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 1 MATCH (node)-[:DEFINED_BY]->(p:Profile) RETURN p.summaryProspectus AS summaryProspectus

question: What is the ISIN code for Microsoft in the VGT portfolio?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VGT'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding {ticker: 'MSFT'}) RETURN h.isin AS isin

question: What distinct issuer categories appear among the holdings of VTI?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) RETURN DISTINCT h.issuerCategory AS issuerCategory

question: How many distinct countries are represented in the BND portfolio holdings?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'BND'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) RETURN count(DISTINCT h.country) AS countryCount

question: What filing document was the VOO portfolio extracted from?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(p:Portfolio)-[:EXTRACTED_FROM]->(d:Document) RETURN d.accession_number AS accessionNumber, d.url AS url, d.filing_date AS filingDate

question: Which source document contains the profile data for the VYM fund?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VYM'})-[:DEFINED_BY]->(p:Profile)-[:EXTRACTED_FROM]->(d:Document) RETURN d.url AS url, d.form AS type, d.filing_date AS filingDate

question: Which company has the CEO with the greatest total compensation among those with reported figures?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company)-[r:HAS_CEO]->(p:Person) WHERE r.ceoCompensation IS NOT NULL RETURN c.name AS companyName, p.name AS ceoName, r.ceoCompensation AS compensation ORDER BY r.ceoCompensation DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who are the top 3 highest-paid CEOs based on actually paid figures?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company)-[r:HAS_CEO]->(p:Person) WHERE r.ceoActuallyPaid IS NOT NULL RETURN c.name AS companyName, p.name AS ceoName, r.ceoActuallyPaid AS actuallyPaid ORDER BY r.ceoActuallyPaid DESC LIMIT 3

question: Which funds do not have any average returns data on record?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund) WHERE NOT (f)-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(:AverageReturns) RETURN f.name AS fundName, f.ticker AS ticker

question: List funds that are missing a profile node entirely.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund) WHERE NOT (f)-[:DEFINED_BY]->(:Profile) RETURN f.name AS fundName, f.ticker AS ticker

question: What are the compensation package details awarded by Apple to its executives?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AAPL'})<-[:AWARDED_BY]-(cp:CompensationPackage) RETURN cp.totalCompensation AS totalCompensation, cp.shareholderReturn AS shareholderReturn, cp.date AS date

question: Show me the most important information about the fund VOO?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'}) MATCH (prov:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(t:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_SHARE_CLASS]->(sc:ShareClass) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[arRel:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:DEFINED_BY]->(prof:Profile)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(o:Section:Objective) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(port:Portfolio) RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName, prov.name AS provider, t.name AS trust, sc.name AS shareClassName, sc.description AS shareClassDescription, fh.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio, fh.totalReturn AS totalReturn, fh.netAssets AS netAssets, fh.turnover AS turnover, r.year AS year, ar.return1y AS return1y, ar.return5y AS return5y, ar.return10y AS return10y, ar.returnInception AS returnInception, o.text AS objective, port.count AS numberHoldings ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: Give me the main details for the VTI fund including returns and holdings
cypher: MATCH (provider:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[fhRel:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WITH provider, f, fh, fhRel ORDER BY fhRel.year DESC WITH provider, f, collect(fh)[0] AS fh OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[arRel:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) WITH provider, f, fh, ar, arRel ORDER BY arRel.year DESC WITH provider, f, fh, collect(ar)[0] AS ar OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[profRel:DEFINED_BY]->(profile:Profile) WITH provider, f, fh, ar, profile, profRel ORDER BY profRel.year DESC WITH provider, f, fh, ar, collect(profile)[0] AS profile OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(p:Portfolio)-[rel:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) WITH provider, f, fh, ar, profile, h, rel ORDER BY toFloat(rel.weight) DESC WITH provider, f, fh, ar, profile, collect({ticker: h.ticker, name: h.name, weight: rel.weight})[0..10] AS topHoldings RETURN f.name AS FundName, f.ticker AS Ticker, f.securityExchange AS Exchange, provider.name AS Provider, fh.expenseRatio AS ExpenseRatio, fh.netAssets AS TotalAssets, fh.totalReturn AS TotalReturn, fh.turnover AS Turnover, ar.return1y AS Return1Y, ar.return5y AS Return5Y, ar.return10y AS Return10Y, ar.returnInception AS ReturnInception, profile.summaryProspectus AS SummaryProspectus, topHoldings AS TopHoldings

question: What is the key information for the BND bond fund?
cypher: MATCH (provider:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund {ticker: 'BND'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[fhRel:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WITH provider, f, fh, fhRel ORDER BY fhRel.year DESC WITH provider, f, collect(fh)[0] AS fh OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[arRel:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) WITH provider, f, fh, ar, arRel ORDER BY arRel.year DESC WITH provider, f, fh, collect(ar)[0] AS ar OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[profRel:DEFINED_BY]->(profile:Profile) WITH provider, f, fh, ar, profile, profRel ORDER BY profRel.year DESC WITH provider, f, fh, ar, collect(profile)[0] AS profile OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(p:Portfolio)-[rel:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) WITH provider, f, fh, ar, profile, h, rel ORDER BY toFloat(rel.weight) DESC WITH provider, f, fh, ar, profile, collect({ticker: h.ticker, name: h.name, weight: rel.weight})[0..10] AS topHoldings RETURN f.name AS FundName, f.ticker AS Ticker, f.securityExchange AS Exchange, provider.name AS Provider, fh.expenseRatio AS ExpenseRatio, fh.netAssets AS TotalAssets, fh.totalReturn AS TotalReturn, fh.turnover AS Turnover, ar.return1y AS Return1Y, ar.return5y AS Return5Y, ar.return10y AS Return10Y, ar.returnInception AS ReturnInception, profile.summaryProspectus AS SummaryProspectus, topHoldings AS TopHoldings

question: Show me a comprehensive overview of the VIG dividend appreciation fund
cypher: MATCH (provider:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund {ticker: 'VIG'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[fhRel:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WITH provider, f, fh, fhRel ORDER BY fhRel.year DESC WITH provider, f, collect(fh)[0] AS fh OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[arRel:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) WITH provider, f, fh, ar, arRel ORDER BY arRel.year DESC WITH provider, f, fh, collect(ar)[0] AS ar OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[profRel:DEFINED_BY]->(profile:Profile) WITH provider, f, fh, ar, profile, profRel ORDER BY profRel.year DESC WITH provider, f, fh, ar, collect(profile)[0] AS profile OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(p:Portfolio)-[rel:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) WITH provider, f, fh, ar, profile, h, rel ORDER BY toFloat(rel.weight) DESC WITH provider, f, fh, ar, profile, collect({ticker: h.ticker, name: h.name, weight: rel.weight})[0..10] AS topHoldings RETURN f.name AS FundName, f.ticker AS Ticker, f.securityExchange AS Exchange, provider.name AS Provider, fh.expenseRatio AS ExpenseRatio, fh.netAssets AS TotalAssets, fh.totalReturn AS TotalReturn, fh.turnover AS Turnover, ar.return1y AS Return1Y, ar.return5y AS Return5Y, ar.return10y AS Return10Y, ar.returnInception AS ReturnInception, profile.summaryProspectus AS SummaryProspectus, topHoldings AS TopHoldings

question: Tell me about the VFIAX fund with all its key metrics and performance data
cypher: MATCH (provider:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund {ticker: 'VFIAX'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[fhRel:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WITH provider, f, fh, fhRel ORDER BY fhRel.year DESC WITH provider, f, collect(fh)[0] AS fh OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[arRel:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) WITH provider, f, fh, ar, arRel ORDER BY arRel.year DESC WITH provider, f, fh, collect(ar)[0] AS ar OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[profRel:DEFINED_BY]->(profile:Profile) WITH provider, f, fh, ar, profile, profRel ORDER BY profRel.year DESC WITH provider, f, fh, ar, collect(profile)[0] AS profile OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(p:Portfolio)-[rel:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) WITH provider, f, fh, ar, profile, h, rel ORDER BY toFloat(rel.weight) DESC WITH provider, f, fh, ar, profile, collect({ticker: h.ticker, name: h.name, weight: rel.weight})[0..10] AS topHoldings RETURN f.name AS FundName, f.ticker AS Ticker, f.securityExchange AS Exchange, provider.name AS Provider, fh.expenseRatio AS ExpenseRatio, fh.netAssets AS TotalAssets, fh.totalReturn AS TotalReturn, fh.turnover AS Turnover, ar.return1y AS Return1Y, ar.return5y AS Return5Y, ar.return10y AS Return10Y, ar.returnInception AS ReturnInception, profile.summaryProspectus AS SummaryProspectus, topHoldings AS TopHoldings

question: Which companies had the most insider purchase transactions? Use case-insensitive matching on transaction type.
cypher: MATCH (c:Company)-[:HAS_INSIDER_TRANSACTION]->(it:InsiderTransaction) WHERE toUpper(it.transactionType) = 'BUY' RETURN c.name AS companyName, count(it) AS buyCount ORDER BY buyCount DESC LIMIT 5

question: How many SELL transactions has each company had among insiders?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company)-[:HAS_INSIDER_TRANSACTION]->(it:InsiderTransaction) WHERE toUpper(it.transactionType) = 'SELL' RETURN c.name AS companyName, count(it) AS sellCount ORDER BY sellCount DESC LIMIT 5

question: List all revenue and cost segments from Apple's 10-K filings.
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AAPL'})-[rel:REPORTS_IN]->(filing:Filing10K)-[:HAS_FINANCIALS]->(fin:Section:Financials)-[:HAS_METRIC]->(m:FinancialMetric)-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(s:Segment) RETURN m.label AS metric, s.label AS segment, s.value AS value, s.percentage AS percentage ORDER BY rel.year DESC

question: Which funds hold companies that have disclosed legal proceedings in their 10-K?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding)-[:REPRESENTS]->(c:Company)-[:REPORTS_IN]->(filing:Filing10K)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(:Section:LegalProceeding) RETURN DISTINCT f.name AS fundName, c.name AS companyName

question: How much has the VIEIX fund increased its net asset value since 2 years ago?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VIEIX'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.netAssetsValueBeginning IS NOT NULL RETURN  f.ticker AS ticker, r.year AS year, fh.netAssetsValueBeginning AS netAssetValue ORDER BY r.year DESC

question: Has anyone sold shares of Tesla recently?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'TSLA'})-[:HAS_INSIDER_TRANSACTION]->(it:InsiderTransaction)-[:MADE_BY]->(p:Person) WHERE it.transactionType = 'Sell' RETURN p.name, it.transactionDate AS date, it.shares, it.price, it.value ORDER BY it.transactionDate DESC

question: Are there any recent insider sales of Tesla stock?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'TSLA'})-[:HAS_INSIDER_TRANSACTION]->(it:InsiderTransaction)-[:MADE_BY]->(p:Person) WHERE it.transactionType = 'Sell' RETURN p.name, it.transactionDate AS date, it.shares, it.price, it.value ORDER BY it.transactionDate DESC

question: Who has been selling TSLA shares in the latest insider transactions?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'TSLA'})-[:HAS_INSIDER_TRANSACTION]->(it:InsiderTransaction)-[:MADE_BY]->(p:Person) WHERE it.transactionType = 'Sell' RETURN p.name, it.transactionDate AS date, it.shares, it.price, it.value ORDER BY it.transactionDate DESC

question: What is the net profit margin for Tesla based on its latest income statement?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'TSLA'})-[:REPORTS_IN]->(:Filing10K)-[:HAS_FINANCIALS]->(fin:Section:Financials) MATCH (fin)-[:HAS_METRIC]->(mNet:FinancialMetric {label: 'NetIncome'}) MATCH (fin)-[:HAS_METRIC]->(mRev:FinancialMetric {label: 'Revenue'}) RETURN c.name AS CompanyName, fin.fiscalYear AS FiscalYear, (mNet.value / mRev.value) * 100 AS NetProfitMarginPercent ORDER BY fin.fiscalYear DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the total revenue reported by Apple in its most recent fiscal year?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AAPL'})-[:REPORTS_IN]->(:Filing10K)-[:HAS_FINANCIALS]->(fin:Section:Financials) MATCH (fin)-[:HAS_METRIC]->(m:FinancialMetric {label: 'Revenue'}) RETURN c.name AS CompanyName, fin.fiscalYear AS FiscalYear, m.value AS Revenue ORDER BY fin.fiscalYear DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the operating income for Microsoft from its latest 10-K filing?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'MSFT'})-[:REPORTS_IN]->(:Filing10K)-[:HAS_FINANCIALS]->(fin:Section:Financials) MATCH (fin)-[:HAS_METRIC]->(m:FinancialMetric {label: 'OperatingIncome'}) RETURN c.name AS CompanyName, fin.fiscalYear AS FiscalYear, m.value AS OperatingIncome ORDER BY fin.fiscalYear DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the gross profit margin for NVIDIA?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'NVDA'})-[:REPORTS_IN]->(:Filing10K)-[:HAS_FINANCIALS]->(fin:Section:Financials) MATCH (fin)-[:HAS_METRIC]->(mGP:FinancialMetric {label: 'GrossProfit'}) MATCH (fin)-[:HAS_METRIC]->(mRev:FinancialMetric {label: 'Revenue'}) RETURN c.name AS CompanyName, fin.fiscalYear AS FiscalYear, (mGP.value / mRev.value) * 100 AS GrossProfitMarginPercent ORDER BY fin.fiscalYear DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which company has the highest shareholder return in their compensation package?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company)<-[:AWARDED_BY]-(cp:CompensationPackage) WHERE cp.shareholderReturn IS NOT NULL RETURN c.name AS companyName, c.ticker AS ticker, cp.shareholderReturn AS shareholderReturn ORDER BY cp.shareholderReturn DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which companies have a compensation package where the shareholder return is above 20%?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company)<-[:AWARDED_BY]-(cp:CompensationPackage) WHERE cp.shareholderReturn > 20 RETURN c.name AS companyName, c.ticker AS ticker, cp.shareholderReturn AS shareholderReturn, cp.totalCompensation AS totalCompensation ORDER BY cp.shareholderReturn DESC

question: Show me companies with shareholder returns exceeding 15% in their executive compensation.
cypher: MATCH (c:Company)<-[:AWARDED_BY]-(cp:CompensationPackage) WHERE cp.shareholderReturn > 15 RETURN c.name AS companyName, c.ticker AS ticker, cp.shareholderReturn AS shareholderReturn, cp.totalCompensation AS totalCompensation ORDER BY cp.shareholderReturn DESC

question: What is the total compensation for executives at Apple?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AAPL'})<-[:AWARDED_BY]-(cp:CompensationPackage) RETURN c.name AS companyName, cp.totalCompensation AS totalCompensation, cp.shareholderReturn AS shareholderReturn ORDER BY cp.totalCompensation DESC

question: Which companies offer compensation packages with total compensation over 10 million?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company)<-[:AWARDED_BY]-(cp:CompensationPackage) WHERE cp.totalCompensation > 10000000 RETURN c.name AS companyName, c.ticker AS ticker, cp.totalCompensation AS totalCompensation, cp.shareholderReturn AS shareholderReturn ORDER BY cp.totalCompensation DESC

question: List all compensation packages for Tesla executives.
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'TSLA'})<-[:AWARDED_BY]-(cp:CompensationPackage) RETURN c.name AS companyName, cp.totalCompensation AS totalCompensation, cp.shareholderReturn AS shareholderReturn ORDER BY cp.totalCompensation DESC

question: Which company has the highest total executive compensation?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company)<-[:AWARDED_BY]-(cp:CompensationPackage) WHERE cp.totalCompensation IS NOT NULL RETURN c.name AS companyName, c.ticker AS ticker, cp.totalCompensation AS totalCompensation ORDER BY cp.totalCompensation DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show me the operating margin for Amazon from the latest filing.
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AMZN'})-[:REPORTS_IN]->(:Filing10K)-[:HAS_FINANCIALS]->(fin:Section:Financials) MATCH (fin)-[:HAS_METRIC]->(mOI:FinancialMetric {label: 'OperatingIncome'}) MATCH (fin)-[:HAS_METRIC]->(mRev:FinancialMetric {label: 'Revenue'}) RETURN c.name AS CompanyName, fin.fiscalYear AS FiscalYear, (mOI.value / mRev.value) * 100 AS OperatingMarginPercent ORDER BY fin.fiscalYear DESC LIMIT 1

question: What was the net income for Apple in each fiscal year?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'AAPL'})-[:REPORTS_IN]->(:Filing10K)-[:HAS_FINANCIALS]->(fin:Section:Financials) MATCH (fin)-[:HAS_METRIC]->(m:FinancialMetric {label: 'NetIncome'}) RETURN c.name AS CompanyName, fin.fiscalYear AS FiscalYear, m.value AS NetIncome ORDER BY fin.fiscalYear DESC

question: Which company reported the highest revenue in their most recent fiscal year?
cypher: MATCH (c:Company)-[:REPORTS_IN]->(:Filing10K)-[:HAS_FINANCIALS]->(fin:Section:Financials) MATCH (fin)-[:HAS_METRIC]->(m:FinancialMetric {label: 'Revenue'}) RETURN c.name AS CompanyName, fin.fiscalYear AS FiscalYear, m.value AS Revenue ORDER BY m.value DESC LIMIT 1

question: Compare the revenue and net income for Google in its latest annual report.
cypher: MATCH (c:Company {ticker: 'GOOGL'})-[:REPORTS_IN]->(:Filing10K)-[:HAS_FINANCIALS]->(fin:Section:Financials) MATCH (fin)-[:HAS_METRIC]->(mRev:FinancialMetric {label: 'Revenue'}) MATCH (fin)-[:HAS_METRIC]->(mNet:FinancialMetric {label: 'NetIncome'}) RETURN c.name AS CompanyName, fin.fiscalYear AS FiscalYear, mRev.value AS Revenue, mNet.value AS NetIncome ORDER BY fin.fiscalYear DESC LIMIT 1

question: Get the total return and expense ratio for each year for the VFIAX fund
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VFIAX'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.totalReturn IS NOT NULL RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, r.year AS year, fh.totalReturn AS totalReturn, fh.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio ORDER BY r.year DESC

question: Show me the NAV at the beginning and end of each year for VTI
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.netAssetsValueBeginning IS NOT NULL AND fh.netAssetsValueEnd IS NOT NULL RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, r.year AS year, fh.netAssetsValueBeginning AS navBeginning, fh.netAssetsValueEnd AS navEnd ORDER BY r.year DESC

question: What were the turnover rates for VOO over the years?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.turnover IS NOT NULL RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, r.year AS year, fh.turnover AS turnover ORDER BY r.year DESC

question: Show me the net income ratio for each year for the BND fund
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'BND'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.netIncomeRatio IS NOT NULL RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, r.year AS year, fh.netIncomeRatio AS netIncomeRatio ORDER BY r.year DESC

question: Get the total net assets for VTSAX in each year
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTSAX'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.netAssets IS NOT NULL RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, r.year AS year, fh.netAssets AS netAssets ORDER BY r.year DESC

question: Show me all financial highlight metrics for VBK from the last 3 years
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VBK'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, r.year AS year, fh.netAssetsValueBeginning AS navBeginning, fh.netAssetsValueEnd AS navEnd, fh.totalReturn AS totalReturn, fh.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio, fh.turnover AS turnover, fh.netIncomeRatio AS netIncomeRatio ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 3

question: What was the total return for VDIGX in 2022?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VDIGX'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE r.year = 2022 AND fh.totalReturn IS NOT NULL RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, r.year AS year, fh.totalReturn AS totalReturn

question: Show me the expense ratio and turnover for each year for the Vanguard Wellington Fund
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE f.name CONTAINS 'Wellington' RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, r.year AS year, fh.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio, fh.turnover AS turnover ORDER BY r.year DESC

question: Which funds have grown their net assets the most over the last 3 years?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.netAssetsValueEnd IS NOT NULL WITH f, r.year AS year, fh.netAssetsValueEnd AS nav ORDER BY year DESC WITH f, collect({year: year, nav: nav}) AS history WHERE size(history) >= 4 AND history[3].nav > 0 RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName, history[0].nav AS latestNav, history[3].nav AS threeYearsAgoNav, ((history[0].nav - history[3].nav) / history[3].nav) * 100 AS percentageGrowth ORDER BY percentageGrowth DESC LIMIT 5

question: How much has VTI's share price increased over the last 5 years?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.netAssetsValueEnd IS NOT NULL WITH f, r.year AS year, fh.netAssetsValueEnd AS nav ORDER BY year DESC WITH f, collect({year: year, nav: nav}) AS history WHERE size(history) >= 6 AND history[5].nav > 0 RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName, history[0].year AS latestYear, history[0].nav AS latestNav, history[5].year AS fiveYearsAgoYear, history[5].nav AS fiveYearsAgoNav, ((history[0].nav - history[5].nav) / history[5].nav) * 100 AS percentageGrowth

question: Show me the NAV growth for VFIAX comparing 2023 to 2020
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VFIAX'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.netAssetsValueEnd IS NOT NULL WITH f, r.year AS year, fh.netAssetsValueEnd AS nav ORDER BY year DESC WITH f, collect({year: year, nav: nav}) AS history RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName, history[0].year AS latestYear, history[0].nav AS latestNav, history[3].year AS threeYearsAgoYear, history[3].nav AS threeYearsAgoNav, history[0].nav - history[3].nav AS absoluteGrowth

question: Which fund had the highest NAV growth percentage in the last 2 years?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.netAssetsValueEnd IS NOT NULL WITH f, r.year AS year, fh.netAssetsValueEnd AS nav ORDER BY year DESC WITH f, collect({year: year, nav: nav}) AS history WHERE size(history) >= 3 AND history[2].nav > 0 RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName, history[0].nav AS latestNav, history[2].nav AS twoYearsAgoNav, ((history[0].nav - history[2].nav) / history[2].nav) * 100 AS percentageGrowth ORDER BY percentageGrowth DESC LIMIT 1

question: Compare VOO's NAV at the beginning and end of the last 4 years
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.netAssetsValueEnd IS NOT NULL WITH f, r.year AS year, fh.netAssetsValueEnd AS nav ORDER BY year DESC WITH f, collect({year: year, nav: nav}) AS history WHERE size(history) >= 5 RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName, history[0].year AS currentYear, history[0].nav AS currentNav, history[4].year AS fourYearsAgoYear, history[4].nav AS fourYearsAgoNav, ((history[0].nav - history[4].nav) / history[4].nav) * 100 AS percentageGrowth

question: Show me the year-over-year NAV changes for BND over the last 3 years
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'BND'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.netAssetsValueEnd IS NOT NULL WITH f, r.year AS year, fh.netAssetsValueEnd AS nav ORDER BY year DESC WITH f, collect({year: year, nav: nav}) AS history WHERE size(history) >= 4 RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName, history[0].year AS year1, history[0].nav AS nav1, history[1].year AS year2, history[1].nav AS nav2, history[2].year AS year3, history[2].nav AS nav3, history[3].year AS year4, history[3].nav AS nav4

question: Show me all holdings in VTI with fair value level 1
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) WHERE r.fairValueLevel IN [1, '1', 'Level 1'] RETURN h.ticker AS ticker, h.name AS holdingName, h.isin AS isin, r.fairValueLevel AS fairValueLevel, r.weight AS weight ORDER BY r.weight DESC

question: Which funds hold Level 2 fair value assets?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) WHERE r.fairValueLevel IN [2, '2', 'Level 2'] OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[rel:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN DISTINCT f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName, fh.netAssets AS netAssets, h.name AS holdingName, r.fairValueLevel AS fairValueLevel ORDER BY rel.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: Are there any funds in the database that hold Level 3 highly illiquid assets?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) WHERE r.fairValueLevel IN [3, '3', 'Level 3'] OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[rel:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName, h.name AS holdingName, r.fairValueLevel AS fairValueLevel ORDER BY rel.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: What percentage of VOO's holdings are fair value level 1?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) WITH count(h) AS total, count(CASE WHEN r.fairValueLevel IN [1, '1', 'Level 1'] THEN 1 END) AS level1Count RETURN (level1Count * 100.0 / total) AS percentageLevel1

question: Show me the top 10 holdings in BND that are fair value level 1 or level 2
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'BND'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) WHERE r.fairValueLevel IN [1, '1', 'Level 1', 2, '2', 'Level 2'] RETURN h.ticker AS ticker, h.name AS holdingName, r.fairValueLevel AS fairValueLevel, r.weight AS weight, r.marketValue AS marketValue ORDER BY r.weight DESC LIMIT 10

question: List all fair value levels present in the VFIAX portfolio
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VFIAX'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) WHERE r.fairValueLevel IS NOT NULL  RETURN DISTINCT r.fairValueLevel AS fairValueLevel ORDER BY fairValueLevel

question: What is the average number of holdings across all Vanguard funds?
cypher: MATCH (prov:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund) WHERE prov.name CONTAINS 'Vanguard' OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(p:Portfolio) RETURN avg(p.count) AS averageHoldings

question: What is the average expense ratio for all funds in the database?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.expenseRatio IS NOT NULL RETURN avg(fh.expenseRatio) AS averageExpenseRatio

question: Show me the average turnover rate for all Vanguard index funds
cypher: MATCH (p:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund) -[rel:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE p.name CONTAINS 'Vanguard' AND f.name CONTAINS 'Index' AND fh.turnover IS NOT NULL RETURN avg(fh.turnover) AS averageTurnoverRate

question: What is the total net assets under management across all funds?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.netAssets IS NOT NULL RETURN sum(fh.netAssets) AS totalNetAssets

question: How many funds does each provider manage?
cypher: MATCH (p:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund) RETURN p.name AS providerName, count(f) AS fundCount ORDER BY fundCount DESC

question: What is the average net assets for bond funds?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE f.name CONTAINS 'Bond' AND fh.netAssets IS NOT NULL RETURN avg(fh.netAssets) AS averageNetAssets

question: Show me the minimum and maximum expense ratios across all funds
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.expenseRatio IS NOT NULL RETURN min(fh.expenseRatio) AS minExpenseRatio, max(fh.expenseRatio) AS maxExpenseRatio

question: How many holdings does VTI have by counting them in the portfolio?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(p:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) RETURN p.count AS holdingsCount, f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName

question: How many holdings does VTI have in its portfolio?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(p:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) RETURN p.count AS holdingsCount, f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName

question: What is the total number of holdings for VOO?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(p:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) RETURN p.count AS holdingsCount, f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName

question: What is the number of holdings for VFIAX from its financial highlights?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VFIAX'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(p:Portfolio) RETURN p.count AS holdingsCount, f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName

question: How many holdings does the Vanguard Small Cap Fund have?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VSCPX'})-[r:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(p:Portfolio) RETURN p.count AS totalHoldings, f.ticker, f.name

question: Show me the portfolio date and series ID for VFIAX.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VFIAX'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(p:Portfolio) RETURN p.date AS portfolioDate, p.seriesId AS seriesId, f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName

question: Show me all funds with more than 5000 holdings, ordered by year.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(p:Portfolio) WHERE p.count > 5000 RETURN DISTINCT f.ticker, f.name, p.count AS numberHoldings

question: Show me the top 10 funds by total return, sorted by year and return value.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.totalReturn IS NOT NULL RETURN f.ticker, f.name, fh.totalReturn, r.year ORDER BY r.year DESC, fh.totalReturn DESC LIMIT 10

question: Show me the latest financial highlights for funds with high turnover, ordered by year.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.turnover > 20 RETURN DISTINCT f.ticker, f.name, fh.turnover, r.year ORDER BY r.year DESC, fh.turnover DESC

question: List all providers managing funds with their latest financial data, sorted by year.
cypher: MATCH (p:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f:Fund)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN DISTINCT p.name AS providerName, f.ticker, f.name, fh.netAssets, r.year ORDER BY r.year DESC, fh.netAssets DESC

question: What are the net assets for the fund with ticker VTI?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN f.ticker, f.name, fh.netAssets ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the net assets for VTI specifically?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN f.ticker, f.name, fh.netAssets ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show me financial data for the exact ticker IMTB.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'IMTB'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN f.ticker, f.name, fh.netAssets, fh.expenseRatio ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: Get the expense ratio for ticker VOO only.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) RETURN f.ticker, f.name, fh.expenseRatio ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the holdings for the fund with ticker VFIAX?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VFIAX'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding) RETURN f.ticker, f.name, h.name AS holdingName, h.ticker AS holdingTicker LIMIT 10

question: Find all documents with reporting dates in 2023.
cypher: MATCH (d:Document) WHERE d.reporting_date CONTAINS '2023' RETURN d.accession_number, d.url, d.form, d.filing_date, d.reporting_date ORDER BY d.reporting_date DESC

question: Which documents have a reporting date in 2023?
cypher: MATCH (d:Document) WHERE d.reporting_date CONTAINS '2023' RETURN d.accession_number AS accession, d.url AS url, d.form AS type, d.filing_date AS filingDate, d.reporting_date AS reportingDate ORDER BY d.reporting_date DESC

question: Show me documents filed in 2022.
cypher: MATCH (d:Document) WHERE d.filing_date CONTAINS '2022' RETURN d.accession_number AS accession, d.url AS url, d.form AS type, d.filing_date AS filingDate ORDER BY d.filing_date DESC

question: Find all documents with reporting dates containing '2024'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Document) WHERE d.reporting_date CONTAINS '2024' RETURN d.accession_number, d.url, d.form, d.filing_date, d.reporting_date ORDER BY d.filing_date DESC

question: Show me all N-CSR form documents for VTI.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:EXTRACTED_FROM]->(d:Document {form: 'N-CSR'}) RETURN d.accession_number, d.url, d.filing_date

question: What is the reporting date and filing date for VTI's documents from 2023?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:EXTRACTED_FROM]->(d:Document) WHERE d.reporting_date CONTAINS '2023' RETURN d.accession_number AS accession, d.url AS url, d.form AS type, d.filing_date AS filingDate, d.reporting_date AS reportingDate ORDER BY d.filing_date DESC

question: Show me all N-CSR documents for VOO.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[:EXTRACTED_FROM]->(d:Document {form: 'N-CSR'}) RETURN d.accession_number AS accession, d.url AS url, d.filing_date AS filingDate, d.reporting_date AS reportingDate ORDER BY d.filing_date DESC

question: Give me an overview of the VOO fund with all the relevant details.
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'}) MATCH (prov:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(t:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_SHARE_CLASS]->(sc:ShareClass) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:DEFINED_BY]->(prof:Profile) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(port:Portfolio) RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName, port.count AS numberHoldings, prov.name AS provider, t.name AS trust, prof.summaryProspectus AS summaryProspectus, sc.name AS shareClassName, sc.description AS shareClassDescription, fh.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio, fh.totalReturn AS totalReturn, fh.netAssets AS netAssets, r.year AS year, ar.return1y AS return1y, ar.return5y AS return5y, ar.return10y AS return10y ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is all the information available for the BND fund?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'BND'}) MATCH (prov:Provider)-[:MANAGES]->(t:Trust)-[:ISSUES]->(f) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_SHARE_CLASS]->(sc:ShareClass) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[arRel:HAS_AVERAGE_RETURNS]->(ar:AverageReturns) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:DEFINED_BY]->(prof:Profile)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(o:Section:Objective) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(port:Portfolio) RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName, prov.name AS provider, t.name AS trust, sc.name AS shareClassName, sc.description AS shareClassDescription, fh.expenseRatio AS expenseRatio, fh.totalReturn AS totalReturn, fh.netAssets AS netAssets, fh.turnover AS turnover, r.year AS year, ar.return1y AS return1y, ar.return5y AS return5y, ar.return10y AS return10y, ar.returnInception AS returnInception, o.text AS objective, port.count AS numberHoldings ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1

question: Show me the per year return evolution of the Vanguard 500 Index from the last three years
cypher: CALL db.index.fulltext.queryNodes('fundNameIndex', 'Vanguard 500 Index~') YIELD node AS f, score WITH f ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 1 MATCH (f)-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.totalReturn IS NOT NULL RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName, r.year AS year, fh.totalReturn AS totalReturn ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 3

question: Show me the annual return history for the last 5 years for VTI
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.totalReturn IS NOT NULL RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, f.name AS fundName, r.year AS year, fh.totalReturn AS totalReturn ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 5

question: Show me all insider transactions made by Satya Nadella, the CEO of Microsoft.
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:MADE_BY]-(it:InsiderTransaction)<-[:HAS_INSIDER_TRANSACTION]-(c:Company) WHERE toLower(p.name) CONTAINS 'nadella' RETURN c.name AS CompanyName, p.name as person, it.transactionType AS TransactionType, it.shares AS Shares, it.price AS Price, it.transactionDate AS TransactionDate ORDER BY it.transactionDate DESC

question: What asset type categories are the top holdings in VOO classified under?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VOO'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding)-[:OF_ASSET_TYPE]->(ac:AssetCategory) WITH ac, h, r ORDER BY r.weight DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN DISTINCT ac.name AS assetTypeCategory, h.ticker AS holdingTicker, h.name AS holdingName, r.weight AS weight

question: What asset categories do the holdings of VTI belong to?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VTI'})-[:HAS_PORTFOLIO]->(:Portfolio)-[r:HAS_HOLDING]->(h:Holding)-[:OF_ASSET_TYPE]->(ac:AssetCategory) RETURN DISTINCT ac.name AS assetCategory, count(h) AS holdingCount ORDER BY holdingCount DESC

question: How much has the VIEIX fund increased its share price since 2 years ago?
cypher: MATCH (f:Fund {ticker: 'VIEIX'})-[r:HAS_FINANCIAL_HIGHLIGHT]->(fh:FinancialHighlight) WHERE fh.netAssetsValueBeginning IS NOT NULL RETURN f.ticker AS ticker, r.year AS year, fh.netAssetsValueBeginning AS netAssetValue ORDER BY r.year DESC
